source_pr.title: ddl : ddl forbid stale read  for cache table and support history read
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: #29218

Problem Summary:
This is a substak See Optimizing hotspot small tables #25293
if a table is cache table. we should forbid stale read or history read.
and alter temporary table cache is invalid
### What is changed and how it works?
+ Ddl forbid stale read  for cache table. but support history read for cache table.
+ Add test  for temporary table can't switch into cacheable
+ Because cache table and temporary table are similar to the prohibition of stale read,  i merged their judgment functions

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Unit test
-  Integration test



### Release note

<!-- bugfix or new feature needs a release note -->

```release-note
None
```

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to concurrency races or unsynchronized shared state. Asynchronous state transitions need polling/Eventually-style checks. This PR stabilizes it by: // test race.

evidence: files: ddl/db_test.go, ddl/ddl_api.go, ddl/table.go, executor/admin_test.go, executor/builder.go, executor/executor_test.go, executor/point_get.go
